title: ASCII Forge
description: A retro ASCII art studio: donut, Mandelbrot, plasma, fractal tree, neon fire — 6 modes, custom char sets, CRT effects, clipboard export.
concept: ASCII Forge renders six real-time generative scenes as ASCII characters. The rotating donut uses Doughnut.c geometry; Mandelbrot zooms in/out; plasma uses summed sine fields; fire runs a cellular automaton; rain emulates Matrix-style drops; sphere does shaded Lambertian lighting. Switch character sets, color modes, and CRT scanlines to style the output. Click to interact with fire and rain. Copy the frame or download as styled HTML.
features: 6 render modes: Donut, Mandelbrot, Plasma, Fire, Digital Rain, Sphere
5 character sets: Classic, Dense, Blocks, Binary, Minimal
5 color themes: Green CRT, Amber, Cyan, White, Rainbow
CRT scanline overlay + glow effect toggles
Click canvas to interact (fire explosion, rain pulse)
Copy frame to clipboard as plain text

interaction.mouse: Click canvas — fire erupts, rain surges
interaction.click: Mode buttons, color swatches, charset selector
